transcript_summary: Closed Won — 2026-03-20. Final call confirmed three key commitments: (1) API will be GA by May 15, (2) dedicated onboarding engineer (Marcus) assigned for 30 days, (3) milestone-based payment schedule agreed. Sarah was engaged throughout. Mike joined for the last 10 minutes and asked two pointed questions about security and data residency — both answered satisfactorily.
sales_rep_notes: Champion is Sarah (VP Eng) — she drove the whole evaluation. Mike (CTO) holds the budget and was skeptical throughout — he's been burned by a vendor before who promised GA timelines and missed them. Don't hedge on the API date in front of Mike. James in DevOps wasn't in any of our demos — he'll be the one doing the actual integration work. Get him into the kickoff call. Sarah said she'd handle that introduction. Watch: James can be a blocker if he feels he wasn't consulted.
commitments_made: API GA by May 15 — confirmed with product team
Dedicated onboarding engineer (Marcus) for first 30 days
Custom migration guide for Node.js + Postgres stack
Milestone-based payment: 50% at kickoff, 50% at API GA
SOC 2 Type II report shared + pen test results provided
objections_handled: Security: SOC 2 Type II + pen test report reviewed and approved
Migration effort: committed to co-building migration guide for their stack
Competitor comparison: outlined 3 technical differentiators vs DataBridge
